vulnerabilities.name: VIN_Write_Overflow
vulnerabilities.description: Sending > 20 bytes to DID 0xF190 (VIN) crashes the service

effect.log_message: Memory Corruption detected in VIN buffer

vulnerabilities.name: Security_Bypass_Magic_Byte
vulnerabilities.description: Writing to DID 0x0101 succeeds if first byte is 0xAA, even if locked

effect.log_message: Security bypass triggered via magic byte

vulnerabilities.name: Resource_Exhaustion_DoS
vulnerabilities.description: Rapid Tester Present frames cause a 5-second hang

effect.log_message: Internal message queue overflow - CPU at 100%

vulnerabilities.name: ISO_TP_Segment_Overlap
vulnerabilities.description: Simulates a bug where overlapping sequence numbers in CF frames causes a crash

vulnerabilities.name: Diagnostic_Session_Leaking
vulnerabilities.description: Entering Programming Session (0x02) without proper transition from Extended

effect.log_message: Unauthorized state transition to Programming Session

vulnerabilities.name: Weak_Seed_Entropy
vulnerabilities.description: ECU provides predictable seeds for Service 0x27
